criteriaResults.evidence: README.md index with 4 playbooks (name/classification/file-link/applicableSymptoms), how-to-add with Sprint 18 parse format, how-to-test with CLI examples, confidence threshold table.

build-failure.md: name+classification=standard+applicableSymptoms (all 4 required + 3 more). 6 steps all with blastRadius/pre/exec/post fields. Steps: identify→fetch logs→classify→branch act→correlate commits→record.

migration-timeout.md classification=emergency. applicableSymptoms generic (db/migration synonyms incl alembic/flyway/liquibase — tool synonyms not platform-specific). 6 steps incl kill-or-wait (blastRadius:risky+rollback), rollback-if-killed step.
error-spike.md classification=emergency. Generic symptoms (no stack tokens). 6 steps: gather metrics→changelog.jsonl correlation→scope→classify cause→executor handoff (risky+rollback)→verify.

latency-regression.md classification=standard. Generic p95/p99 symptoms. 7 steps: identify+baseline→resource saturation→downstream deps→deploy correlation→classify→remediation (risky+rollback)→verify.

playbook-search.ts: Playbook, PlaybookMatch, loadPlaybooks, searchPlaybooks, searchPlaybooksList, tokenize, HIGH=0.6/LOW=0.3 exported. Sorted desc, confidence [0,1]. Tests verify 'button is grey' returns zero ≥0.6 matches; 'database migration timing out' → migration-timeout ≥0.6; 'p99 latency spike' → latency-regression ≥0.6. loadPlaybooks skips README, gracefully handles malformed YAML, ENOENT→[].
agents/bober-diagnoser.md:132 'call searchPlaybooks(incident.symptom)'. Step 0 documents branching: ≥0.6 follow playbook, 0.3-0.59 suggest, <0.3 freeform. EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT block.
playbook.ts list/show/search subcommands. show ENOENT→exitCode=1. search prints NAME/CONFIDENCE/TIER/MATCHED TOKENS with color tiers. Registered in cli/index.ts:31,270.
